steps.title: Spot the contrast word
steps.content: The passage uses the word “however” to introduce a study that calls the energy‑ladder model reductive.

steps.title: Match the purpose to the contrast
steps.content:
The correct answer describes the author’s goal as challenging the common income‑based explanation for fuel choices.
The other choices either talk about contrasting two countries, linking fuel use to income, or critiquing a model of fuel prices, none of which appears in the passage.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
